feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sap Analytics Cloud - Input a Date Parameter into a Data Action to assign a value to a measure
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,  

I want a data action to be trigged when I assign hours to an employee. 

In this case I want to assign hours worked by an employee to a measure "AssignHours" on a date chosen by the user. 

This is the data action code: 

The Data is in the format YYYY-MM-DD and the parameter input is a string. 

When I replace MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %Date% with MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "2024-01-01" (meaning hard code the date), it works and assigned the hours to the measure. 

However, as I am calling the data action in a responsive story page, when I hard code this into the pulled parameter shown below it does not assign the hours to the measure. 

Even though the parameters are accepted by the Data Action (no issues detected in Data Action Monitor), the data action fails to trigger and gives the following error:
There are validation errors in the data action when trying to run it on version "Actual" 

Can you assist with issue I am having.

entry.title: Direct filters with linked dimensions on date vs calendar week
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have two import models in the SAC with linked dimensions. One of the linked dimensions is the date. But in the story we have set the date-filter on calendar week and not the specific date in day granularity as we want to have a look at whole calendar weeks.

So what I am wondering now is: What does the SAC do in the background?

=> When I am filtering in the primary model on a certain calendar week with the calendar week filter in the story all data is being selected with a date within the selected calendar week. That is clear and easy to understand.

=> ...but how  does the direct filter via the linked dimension select on the secondary model and its date dimension in detail? Will the selction of the whole calendar week on the primary model be forwarded to the secondary model? Or will it just be the dates on day granularity found in the primary model that will be forwarded to the secondary model?

For example:
When I would select on calendar week 18 in 20024 and I only have data in there for Monday and Tuesday ( 2024/04/29 and 2024/04/30) but in the secondary model is data for each day of the week, will the secondary model just be filtered with 2024/04/29 and 2024/04/30 (and the data of 2024/05/01, ... 2024/05/05 will be missing) or will it be filtered with all days / dates of calendar week 18.2024?

Thanks a lot!
Martin

entry.title: How to transform a date into calendar week in SAC within the model data in wrangling
entry.content:
Hello SAC-Community,

I am thinking of how to be able to join two import data sources into one SAC model. One of the join criterias would be the calendar week.

So I would import the data with dates from the first data source (SQL database) and then add data from a BW on HANA, where I already have a field with calendar week and year.

Therefore I would have to tranform the date from the imported SQL-data into the calendar week. But how can I achieve this? I did not find a function for this in the SAC wrangling environment. Has there anybody an idea?

(...and the calendar week that is in the date dimension for filtering does not seem to be available for joining two data sources in the data warangling environment)

Thanks a lot and best regards,
Martin

entry.title: How to Auto fill Planning Columns in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

I am working on FTE planning and the Planning is done Month wise . My measure is FTE .

I have been asked to auto fill the FTE coming from HR Master Data for each employee into these forecasted months by default .

Example if employee 1 FTE is 0.5 then copy this value to Forecast from JAN-DEC planning columns.

Please Help .

 

Thanks,

Zeba

entry.title: Input Control Changing Font Size
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need change the font size in input control member selection.

I try to CSS for this case. It works for Header Title and Subtitle but not work in selection. Is there a solution for this?

entry.title: Input Control Changing Font Size
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need change the font size in input control member selection.

 

 

I try to CSS for this case. It works for Header Title and Subtitle but not work in selection. Is there a solution for this?

entry.title: Filter script to evade BW variable
entry.content:
Dear all

I created a story with BW live data connection with a variable prompt when opening the story to select a business division for reporting.
I used a R-visualization to display indicator arrows in Red or Green. Unfortunately the R-vizualization doesn't work with the input variable from BW.

Is there a way to create some kind of filter (drop-down-field filled with values from BW e. g.) with a script which can be used to select the business division when opening the story? Or maybe on the first page of the story or something like that.
The goal is, that all pages are getting filtered with it.

Thanks for your help!
Stefan

entry.title: show count of rows in a table in SAC
entry.content: i have a table where i wanted to show count of rows in a table header as shown below,

entry.title: SAC Input Control with BW live hierarchies and restricted user authorizations not properly working
entry.content:
Dear all, 

we have the following issue: I have a simple story with BW live data with a filter on Cost Center Hierarchies and a P&L Table.

I would like to use this story for various dashboard users with different authorization rights (either the full hierarchy or only a subset of the hierarchy, data authorization rights are coming from BW).  

However if an end-user with restricted data authorization rights accesses the story he sees his filter but he does not see the table. 

If I now unselect the "All" and select the individual nodes in the filter data in the table will be shown.. 

As this is not a solution that end-users would accept I wanted to ask if this is a bug or feature and if someone has an idea how to solve that?  

BR, Daniel

PS: if I build the same setting with an Application (classic mode) interestingly this works initially also for the end user (but only until filter settings are changed to another hierarchy for the first time)

entry.title: SAC Security User Best Practice
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I was wondering if there exists a best practice regarding the creation of the basic configuration of the system starting a project, like basic roles, and connections.

We used a consultant user to create all these configurations, but in one point this user was no longer in the project and the customer decided to retire the user from SAC and their Active Directory, and this broke the system access enterely, because some configurations were tied to that user. In the end we had to disable SSO and re create the deleted user in order to re-gain access to the system and then change the ownership of security and connections to another user. It worked.

So the question is if there's a best practice for this? It came to my mind the idea to create a generic system user like "SAC_ADMIN" (which will remain created forever), and with that user create all the content related to security and connections, and only have a pro licence on him when needed, but maybe we're missing something.

Thanks!

entry.title: How to export all script objects from an Optimized Story Experience? (open a .package export file)
entry.content:
I want to store all the scripts from an Optimized Story Experience in a github repository for version control and pre-deployment revisions. I am looking for automated alternatives to manually copying the content of each script.

I am currently working with the (soon to be depracated) File System export, which produces a .tgz archive. This file can be then unpacked and parsed to extract the scripts, which I need to store. It works for me now, but at some point File System is meant to be depracated.

I tried to use the recommended Content Network Storage, but the downloaded export file has a .package extension. Is it possible to somehow access the content of this file locally? Or maybe to export the files from the Content Network Storage as a regular archive?

Or maybe there is whole different way to bulk export all of the scripts from an Optimized Story Experience?

entry.title: Automatically include last day of month in time range
entry.content: I'd like my time range to automatically extend to the final day of each month. Currently, it displays data only until 07/04, as today's date is 07/05. How can I configure it to include data until the last day of the month? I'd like to have the ability to review data from the past 6 months, ensuring that it encompasses the final day of each month to prevent any data loss. I use the filter called "calendar day (interval)".

entry.title: SAC Planning: Display different periods for different versions
entry.content:
Hi community,

in a planning table, I would like to display not every period for every version. As an example, I want to display the actuals for P01 and the forecast (another version) for P02. And I dont want to see P01 for the Forecast or P02 for the Actuals.

I would do have it like that:

 ActualsForecast
 P01P02
Measure 12342342
Measure 223233

I dont what:

 Actuals Forecast 
 P01P02P01P02
Measure 1234--2342
Measure 223--233

According to this page, that should work with advanced filtering.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/90c10b3bc47944f39cdaa3cc002fe96a.html?locale=en-US

But its not working at my table. For both versions, P01 and P02 are displayed, although I only want P01 for the actuals and P02 for the forecast. Do you have any ideas? Or are there other possibilites how I could achive the same result?

Thanks
Eric

I will include some screenshots of what I did.

entry.title: SAC Story : Recent n Dates calculation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am working on a SAC Story(Optimized Design) based on a Datasphere live model*.

There is a measure named, Inventory Date*. My requirement is to display the latest/recent 10 dates from the Inventory date in the SAC table.

SAC Table Column would contain the latest 10 Inventory dates and Table row will have one measure value in row section of the table

Note:Extra Information

1.Inventory Date only displays the Monday's date . For example, for any of the dates among 7th ,8th,9th,10th May 2024, Inventory date would be 6th of may(i.e Monday).I have already created calculation to display only the Monday's date.

2.We are using a live model, so number of entries in Inventory date column may vary. We need the most recent 10 dates.

Please help me to achieve this calculation.

Regards,

Krishn Kant

entry.title: SAC scripting: Change measure based on value of a dimension input control?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a dimension input control like this:

I want to change the dimension of another chart based on the selected dimension in that dimension input control.

For example of "Hersteller" is selected there, I want the dimension of a bar chart to be "Serie". Etc.

Is that generally possible in the SAC?

entry.title: SAC Import Job for Month End
entry.content:
Business needs to run import job multiple times a day (4 times a day) for the last week in the month. 

Question:

- Is there any recommendations on how we would be able to accomplish this?

- I've read some folks suggest creating identical import jobs and schedule them staggered out in the required timeframe. This means I might have 7 import jobs scheduled. Is there any impact to performance issues either in the input forms or any other assets?

entry.title: prevent a user from deleting a zero in sap analytics cloud planning
entry.content: Hi all, how can I prevent a user from deleting a zero in sap analytics cloud planning template without data locks or locking the cell. The user should still be able to change the zero to any other value, except physically deleting the zero i.e. making it unbooked SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: SAC Data Action - are IF statements like a select on the data and then the if block is executed?
entry.content:
Hello Planning Gurus,

I got a general question on how the data is processed in data actions. Coming from BW my thinking was that a data action loops thru the data and executes on every record the data action code sequentially (like a BW start routine would do).

However, recently code of one data action acted weired (see long text bellow) and I wonder if I was thinking wrong all the time and there is no overall loop but the code is simply executed sequentially and is resulting in selection based loops. 

So your memberset makes the first select. If you have an if statement for a particular month this is then selected from the memberset result and the if statement block is executed on that selected data (now in a loop) and written back if there is any data() command.

Next if statement is again selecting data from the memberset result (could overlapp with previous if statement) and executed...

Is this how an data action works? 

Thanks and best regards
Axel

Data Action Problem that triggered the question in regards to processing
---------------------------------------

I got a data action that is calculating the difference Q1 to Q1 previous year using variablemembers for a monthly planning model.

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("I_GROWTH")
MEMBERSET [d/Monat] = BASEMEMBER([d/Monat].[h/YM],%YEAR_TO_CALCULATE%  )
 
AGGREGATE_DIMENSIONS = ....
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
 
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q1 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q1 OF [d/Monat]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q2 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q2 OF [d/Monat]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q3 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q3 OF [d/Monat]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q4 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q4 OF [d/Monat]
 
DELETE([d/Measures]="I_GROWTH")
 
IF [d/Monat].[p/QUARTERDESC]="Q1" THEN
   DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q1,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q1)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+       (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q1Q2%,[d/Measures]="REV",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)
ENDIF
// Write growth bonus to last month of qtr
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Mar" THEN
    IF (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q1,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q1)) >= 1000 THEN
    DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q1,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q1)*3.00
ENDIF
 
ENDIF

This is working fine. Requirement changed now that growth for Q4 should be compared only Nov and Dec (not the full qrt) so I adjusted the code to check for month

IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Nov" THEN
DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q3Q4%,[d/Measures]="REV",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)
ENDIF
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Dec" THEN
 DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+ (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q3Q4%,[d/Measures]="REV",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)

 IF (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)) >= 700 THEN
 DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)*3.00
ENDIF
ENDIF
 
Problem: the if statement for November seems to be executed after Dec. Hence the QTR_VARIANCE variable holds only difference Dec to Dec and therfore the growth bonus is calculated to low. (at least that is my only explanation). The Nov statement is definitly executed I checked that by writing some data to Nov month.
 
When I changed code to 
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Nov" OR [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Dec" THEN
DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q3Q4%,[d/Measures]="PAX",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)

ENDIF
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Dec" THEN
 IF (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)) >= 700 THEN
 DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)*3.00
 ENDIF
ENDIF
It was working as expected.

entry.title: sharing just the bookmark and restrict accessing the original Story.
entry.content:
Hello community,

We're dealing with a live connection in SAP SAC, which means we can't handle data security at the row level.

For instance, granting access to data from specific countries for a team isn't possible.

We're considering using bookmarks to address this issue. Our goal is to share only the bookmarked view with users while keeping the original story inaccessible. For example, Team 1 should only see a bookmark filtered by USA without access to the complete story.

If directly controlling access to the original story isn't doable, we're exploring alternative options within SAP SAC to achieve this without backend modifications.

kind regards,

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud : How to get the Model size in MB/GB in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In the support link mentioned below , they have mentioned that we need to create the story on top of MEMORY_CONSUMPTION_BASE_1 model.

But I am not able to create a story on top of this model. I am already having BI ADMIN role for my ID.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3426761 

Do we have any Analytical App already to check the model size?

In the older version of SAC , the sizing of the models will be explicitly mentioned in the monitor tab.

SAC Experts please help on this!!

@thomas_fery @DebjitSingha
